# `.jos/` — JOS governance surface

<!-- Auto-generated by JOS charter sync. DO NOT EDIT. -->
<!-- Generated at: 2026-05-17T19:37:17.102188+00:00 -->

This directory is the JOS governance surface for **foundry-cip** (venture: `foundry`). It's projected from the master charter at `jordan-operating-system/distribution/charters/foundry-cip.yaml`.

## Files

| File | Purpose | Edit? |
|---|---|---|
| `charter.yaml` | The binding — which JOS standing orders, rules, contracts, gates apply to this venture | **No.** Synced from JOS. Edits overwritten. |
| `glossary.yaml` | Canonical JOS vocabulary. Consult before inventing a term | **No.** Synced from JOS. |
| `knowledge-index.yaml` | Flat catalog of every JOS governance object with one-line summary | **No.** Synced from JOS. |
| `onboarding-status.yaml` | Track of this venture's onboarding progress (JOS-PB-007) | **Yes** (managed by `jos onboard`). |
| `.cache/` | Local cache for `jos fetch <id>` (24h TTL) | No — runtime, gitignored. |
| `ABOUT-JOS.md` | One-page primer on what JOS is and why this venture uses it | **No.** Synced from JOS. |

## Read order for new agents

1. **`../CLAUDE.md`** (at repo root) — agent behavioral standards
2. **`ABOUT-JOS.md`** — JOS in 60 seconds (why this venture is JOS-governed)
3. **`charter.yaml`** — what governance applies
4. **`knowledge-index.yaml`** — what JOS objects exist (search this; fetch full text on demand)
5. **`onboarding-status.yaml`** — what's done, what's pending

## First-time setup (bootstrap chicken-and-egg)

The charter declares `scripts/jos check` as the validation command. If `../scripts/jos` doesn't yet exist in this repo, the JOS CLI hasn't been bootstrapped locally. Run this **once** from a JOS clone or with `JOS_LOCAL` pointing at one:

```bash
# From the JOS source tree (where scripts/jos.py lives):
python scripts/jos.py onboard --repo /path/to/foundry-cip --scaffold

# Or from this repo with JOS_LOCAL set:
JOS_LOCAL=/path/to/jordan-operating-system \
    python $JOS_LOCAL/scripts/jos.py onboard --repo . --scaffold
```

That creates `../scripts/jos` (a shim) plus any missing `.jos/` plumbing. After that, the local commands work:

```bash
scripts/jos check                 # validate against charter
scripts/jos lookup <term>         # search glossary + knowledge-index
scripts/jos fetch <object-id>     # fetch full text of a JOS object
scripts/jos onboard               # re-run onboarding phases
scripts/jos library status        # what bundles this venture has adopted
```

## Sync mechanics

This directory is updated by the JOS charter-sync agent on the JOS-host machine (currently `corsair-pc`) every 15 minutes, plus immediately on any JOS commit that touches charter-relevant paths (via git post-commit hook). Each sync opens a PR; merge to land the update. See `jordan-operating-system/distribution/charter-file-spec.md`.

**Schema version of this charter:** `1.9` (per JOS-SPEC-001).
